Never get blocked
Lite mode adds {amount}/week after you run out
perk.free_wait: When tokens run out, wait until monthly reset
perk.beta_access: Priority beta access to new features

upgrade.subtitle_exceeded: You've used up your current tier's limit.
upgrade.subtitle_default: Need more meeting registrations and AI analysis?
upgrade.selffix: ✂️ Trim the meeting log to {limit} characters or fewer to save it on your current tier right away. Upgrade to process longer meeting logs at once.
upgrade.reset_days: 💡 Usage auto-resets in {days} days, restoring your limit. Upgrade below if you need it sooner.
upgrade.reset_today: 💡 Resetting today — your usage will be cleared shortly.
upgrade.note: Your subscription begins immediately after registering a card. When upgrading, only the prorated difference for the remaining days is charged.

pro_max_notice: You've reached the Pro Max limit. If you need more capacity, please contact an administrator.

mailto.upgrade_body:
Hello,

I'd like to upgrade to Harness {label} ({price}).

Thank you.
